case_title: FUNG, KAM CHUEN et al VS SORIANO, JESSIE W. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,485.51 FILED BY FUNG, KAM CHUEN FUNG, LUCY AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, JESSIE W. SORIANO, MONICA R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, JESSIE W.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-23-2004, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-19-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUNG, KAM CHUEN FUNG, LUCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SORIANO, JESSIE W. SORIANO, MONICA R. $1,485.51 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,507.51, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, JESSIE W. SORIANO, MONICA R.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, MONICA R.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SORIANO, JESSIE W. SORIANO, MONICA R.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-23-2004 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANTS WILL PAY $1,410 AS PER SCHEDULE MEDIATED 2/23/04. IF AMOUNT PAID, NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY; TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
